Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Continued To Feb-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Judith Ekstrand.

Mr. Freedman stated that he has confirmation that the funds have been wired to the Estate, that he has not received the receipt from Wells Fargo and that he has a settlement from all five Beneficiaries. The Order to Appear was taken off calendar. Status of the receipt for the blocked account was continued to February 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman, Esq. for and with Judith M. Ekstrand (Executor).

The Court addressed parties on issues of today's hearing due to the missing estate funds, status on the sale of the house, and deposit money into the blocked account.
Mr. Freedman reported that the balance of $295,462.00 was not deposited because Ms. Ekstrand need to send a letter to the title company with instruction on the closing of escrow and to transfer the money directly to Wells Fargo blocked account. Further to wrap up the accounting with his CPA and put a schedule together so final petition for distribution could be file.
Ms. Ekstrand stated that the escrow is now set to close on Jan. 18, 2012; the delay was due to the potential buyers with loan approval process since Oct.
The Court set the next status hearing date on 01-25-12 at 9:00 a.m., copy of the letter to the title company shall be file no later then 12-30-11 and for filing receipt of funds into blocked account.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Continued To Dec-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Continued To Dec-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status - Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Dec-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Executor to explain why they were not present, why the receipt for the blocked account has not been filed and why they should not be sanctioned for failure to appear at today's hearing. The return date is December 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. , in Dept. 204. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Oct-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Judith Ekstrand.

The status of Substitution of Attorney and the Status of Administrator were continued to October 4, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Continued To Oct-04-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Crawford for Judith Ekstrand. Michael Freedman also present.

Mr. Freedman stated that he was just retained yesterday, that the Client does not oppose the Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel and that they had no time to sign the Substitution of Attorney. Ms. Crawford stated that she has not received the accounting, that she has not heard from any of the Charitable Beneficiaries and that they were given notice of the initial petition. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel (subject to receipt/review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.

Off Calendar Apr-06-2011 Continued To May-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robin Crawford for Judith Ekstrand (Petitioner/Executrix).

The Court noted that no one from the Charities was present. A Notice to Appear will be issued to Judith Ekstrand to appear on May 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the administration of the Estate and explain why a Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. Notice to appear will also be sent to the Charities. The Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel was also continued to May 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
